raw_consumer_statement:
Complaint Against : American Express Product : Credit Card / Billing Dispute Dispute Reference Number : XXXX Description of Issue : I am filing this complaint because American Express has failed to correct a billing error for {$120.00}, despite the merchant ( Booking.com ) admitting in writing that the refund is due and claiming to have processed it. I am currently caught in an administrative deadlock where the bank refuses to investigate, and the merchant claims the bank already has the funds.

Timeline of Events : XX/XX/year> : I purchased a " Fast Track '' pass from XXXX for {$120.00}. The service was not delivered on time, rendering it useless. 

XX/XX/year> : XXXX agreed to a refund. They claim internally that this refund was processed on this date. 

XXXX XXXX : The refund never appeared on my Amex statement. I disputed the charge ( XXXX XXXX ). 

XX/XX/XXXX & XXXX, XXXX  : I contacted XXXX again. Their agents explicitly stated the refund was " successfully processed '' on their end ( Transaction Ref : XXXX ). However, this reference number appears to be an internal order ID, not a valid banking Acquirer Reference Number ( ARN ). 

XX/XX/year> : Amex closed the dispute in the merchant 's favor, stating " The expected goods or services have not been received '' was not a valid reason or that the merchant had already addressed it. Amex reversed the provisional credit. 


Current Status : Amex refuses to reopen the dispute because it is " Closed. '' XXXX refuses to re-issue the refund because their system shows it as " paid. '' The Unfair Practice : American Express is in violation of the Fair Credit Billing Act ( FCBA ). I have provided chat logs where the merchant 's representatives ( agents XXXX XXXX and XXXX XXXX ) explicitly confirm that : A refund of XXXX XXXX  ( {$120.00} ) was intended. 

They believe it was sent. 

Since the credit has never posted to my account, this is a " Credit Not Processed '' error. Amex has accepted the merchant 's " internal confirmation '' of a refund as proof, without verifying if the funds actually settled. 


I attach the chats with Booking.com where the representative XXXX XXXX says : " The refund was processed on XXXX XXXX itself '' and provides the Ref ID XXXX.
